category_sources: source_facts.description says this is a library for manipulating fonts.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official fonttools GitHub project; project branding is fontTools.
docs_sources: The official project homepage is source_facts.homepage; the project also publishes official documentation on Read the Docs.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub source-control project URL.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a font manipulation library; source_facts.executables lists fonttools command-line tools.
